feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cloud foundry sign in is always asking for SSO passcode
entry.content:
Cloud Foundry sign in for Business Application studio is asking for SSO auth code for which a temporary pass code can be generated and given. 

Is there a way we can bypass it? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BAS from VS Code, can not load Synonyms
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When I open a project from VS Code with BAS, synonyms defined with .hdbsynonym files can not be used in calculation view modeling.

If I open the project from BAS with a browser all works perfectly.

From Visual Studio Code with proper extension I get this error.

I use the extension SAP Business Application Studio Toolkit and configure it as explained in this page.

https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/sap-business-application-studio/working-remotely

Other problems that I found is that some projects (SAP HANA Native applications / HDB Modules) sometimes fail to open with this error.

 

Is the extension suppose to work with HANA Native Applications / HDB Modules or only with development projects (the one to develop Odata for example)?

or instead the extension is working for you and there are workaround?

Thanks,
Alberto

entry.title: Migrate extended app from WEBIDE to BAS
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have "My timesheet" ( ZHCMFAB_MY_TIME) app, which is extended in WEBIDE in BTP NEO environment. We need to migrate this app from WEBIDE to BAS. 

1) Is it possible to migrate an extended Fiori app from WEBIDE to BAS?
2) If yes, can we use migration option given by BAS tool? will it change any files and how do we revert incase of any issues? Any best practice available?

Appreciate if you could help with above questions

Thanks,

Swarnaprakash

entry.title: How to display invalid entry message in calculation view input paramter
entry.content:
Hi all,

We need to implement a feature that displays an “invalid entry” message when a user inputs invalid data into the input parameter of a calculation view created in Business application studio. Despite extensive research, I have not found any viable solutions. Could someone please advise if there is an available option to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

Chethan

entry.title: Business application studio: dev space stuck in status 'Starting'
entry.content:
Hi, 

My dev space stuck in status 'Starting' for a long time and I can't enter my dev space. Anyone has a solution to get it into the 'Running' status ?

The workspace ID: ws-vllvb

entry.title: BAS is not getting started.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please check as my BAS is not getting started.

entry.title: How to display action result data in Page using rules in SAP MDK?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to perform read call on press of button and in the success of that call we are trying to set value using rule. The value is getting set but it is not displaying. 

Thanks and Regards,

Madhav

entry.title: How can we consume northwind and S4HANA on premise services in single UI5 App in SAP BAS ?
entry.content:
Requirement is that consume 2 different services i.e Northwind and any other on-premise system i.e(S4D) in 1 ui5 freestyle application using SAP BAS ?

SAP Fiori

entry.title: Issues when standard app 'Transfer Stock - Cross-Plant' (F1957) extension tried via BAS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have the standard app called  'Transfer Stock - Cross-Plant' app ID F1957.

I need to create an adaptation project for this app with field modifications and controller extension. Since this is app is having synchronous view, BAS  suggested to create Extension Project. So, I went with that. But in the next step Create Extension screen is not loading and is blank.

When I checked the console, error is present. Because of which, it was not opening it seems.

Kindly suggest what needs to be done for this issue.

 

Regards,

Bhaskar

entry.title: How to consume BPA destination in the Fiori template in BAS?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a Build Process and after deployment i created a BPA destination using all the necessary additional properties in BTP Cockpit .

When UI guy is trying to add service this destination is not appearing in the list . Just want to understand is it possible to directly consume BPA instance in BAS or not? If yes then please guide on this.

Kindly share your inputs.

Thanks!

entry.title: WEb Application /dist cap
entry.content:
Hi

When I build a cap application with a ui module, the dist folder is generated but it is not deleted afterwards.
When I access it, it is shown in web applications
Why is this happening?

 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Adaptation projects in Business Application Studio broken suddenly as of Oct 22
entry.content:
Has a new change to Adaptation Projects just been rolled out? I was editing adaptation projects, running them and deploying them as late as yesterday however today none of them are working. The old Adaptation Project Preview and Visual Editor and deploy options are missing from the menu for all of my projects.

I don't know if it is relevant but I tried creating a new adaptation project from template but I am unable to select any SAP UI5 version except the latest and it gives a message saying the project will not be usable on my system:

entry.title: how to consume ODATA while performing CRUD operation in SAP BAS trail version
entry.content:
Im trying to use Northwind service (Entityset - Employees), but unable to give proper ODATA service url or is it restricted to use NW services for CRUD on Trail version.

Kindly assist.

entry.title: Mock Data Editor is not opening is SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hello all,
I am trying to open Data Editor in SAP BAS for SAPUI5 freestyle app and we are using OData V2 version CAP service in UI5 app.
I am getting below error while I try to open Data Editor, please suggest.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: How to deploy Angular or React App to SAP Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
I have developed React and Angular Web Applications through BAS that I need to deploy on SAP Fiori Launchpad, the same as we deploy our Custom Fiori App(Created through BAS or WEBIDE) to the SAP Fiori Launchpad is there any way we can achieve this? I have gone through the links below but they don't answer what I am looking for.

Links:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-portal-cloud-foundry-getting-started.html

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-run-reactjs-web-apps-in-sap/ba-p/13455919

entry.title: Deploy to different BTP subaccount with Cloud Connector destination
entry.content:
Dear experts, please advise how to use the Cloud Connector destination configured on a different BTP subaccount than the one where my MTA app was developed.

My environment:

edit - diagram for the environment

 

- there are 2 BTP accounts and respective subbacounts, one for SAP BAS and one for SAP Build Work Zone. My app was developed in SAP BAS on the first, and now needs to be deployed to the second

- there is a Cloud connector destination on each BTP account, with principal propagation, towards the same on-premise ABAP system. These destinations have exactly the same name "D1_PP" and identical attributes on both BTP accounts. I already verified both to be working correctly. According to this resource, it should be possible to use the new subbact destination if it has been configured identically:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/deploy-app-from-own-bas-to-custom-cloud-foundry/qaq-p/12647946

- on the SAP BAS account there is also an older destination to the same on-prem ABAP with basic authentification. It was used for the development onset but since abandoned. That one has a different name, "D1". Also, the Build Work Zone used to be active on the old account but was since deactivated and is now not available.

- The MTA packaging and deployment was originally carried out when the app was using the old destination D1. It worked there without issues. Only then did the environment changed, removed Build Work Zone subscription from first to second BTP account and created the new destinations D1_PP on both. And the task is now to switch to new destination and deploy to new subaccount

- at the moment there are no issues in either switching in SAP BAS to D1_PP, neither in deployment to new BTP. The app appears in the HTML5 Apps section of the new subaccount, the destination instances appear in the CF space. However the app does not start, with message "...completed with status 500 Error while retrieving destination D1 from destination service. HTTP status code: 404...". So apparently the app is trying to use the old destination, not the new one.

- I did check the xs-app.json, the destination there is correctly set to new name D1_PP. I assume that the old name still lingers somewhere in the MTA files but I do not know where to look.

Thank you in advance for any suggestions how to proceed.

Petra Milinkovic

 

 

-

entry.title: EKEYTYPE: The key argument has to be of type `string` or `number`. Found: `undefined` in CAP.
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

GoodDay!

This issue was raised in between the development (when adding attachment feature to my CAP application – used @cap-js/sdm library as mentioned in CAPIRE documentation)

Below is the structure of my header and attachment entity.

InvoiceHeader – Entity

Attachment – Entity

I’ve implemented a custom handler for InvoiceHeader entity on Update event.

I’m running my application in a hybrid mode and I’m opening my annotated UI application (built using FPM). When trying to edit a record and saving it showing me the below error.

             EKEYTYPE: The key argument has to be of type `string` or `number`. Found: `undefined`

When I’m debugging it, the error was coming from the SELECT statement (which was working previously) line no.103 like in the below screenshot. However the query executed successfully where you can see the result in aHeaders variable.

I’m sure “ID” is the only key for InvoiceHeader Entity and the value is coming via “req.data.ID” parameter.

I’m trying to figure it out, I’m not sure where I’m lagging.

Help me to resolve this issue.

Thanks in Advance!!

Best Regards

Boopalan M

SAP Business Application Studio , SAP Cloud Application Programming Model ,

SAP HANA Cloud , SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database

entry.title: How to access HTML5 Application in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry from mobile device
entry.content:
I create app in BAS and deploy to SAP BTP Cloud Foundry.

I would like to access this app from mobile device.

Is it possible to access like via app url or something?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: index.html missing while genereting app within BAS with CAP local project and SAP Fiori Elements
entry.content:
While I generate app within BAS devspace with CAP local project as data source and SAP Fiori Elements the output does not contain index.html file.

It seems like there is an issue with this generator. As I run this generator project I see error message: index.html does not exist. 

"Fiori App Generator - The Application wizard would have generated 4 html files: webapp/index.html, webapp/test/flpSandbox.html and webapp/test/testsuite.qunit.html and webapp/test/integration/opaTests.qunit.html for each UI component (in folder app/<component> you generate with it. The file webapp/index.html is host the component directly without fiori lanuchpad sandbox environment."

entry.title: How to save Odata data in SAP BUILD APP in PDF format.
entry.content:
I am created a project in SAP Build App and data in coming from Odata link in UI also.
Now, I want to save that data in PDF format.
